settings.admin.description: Configure workspace-wide settings that apply to all users.
settings.admin.supportedThemes.title: Supported themes
settings.admin.supportedThemes.hint: Controls which presentation themes are available in this workspace.
settings.admin.aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant Identity
settings.admin.aiAssistant.hint: Customize the name and email shown for AI-generated content.
settings.admin.aiAssistant.name: Name
settings.admin.emailSender.title: Email Sender Identity
settings.admin.emailSender.hint: From address for system emails. Falls back to environment variables if empty.
settings.admin.emailSender.name: Name
settings.admin.sessionDuration.title: Session Duration
settings.admin.sessionDuration.hint: How long users stay logged in before needing to sign in again.
settings.integrations.description: Connect external services via webhooks to receive notifications about events.
settings.mcp.title: Connect via API / MCP
settings.mcp.description: Deckyard speaks the Model Context Protocol: point Claude Desktop, Cursor, or a remote agent at this server to create and edit decks in natural language. Remote access authenticates with one of the API keys above.
settings.mcp.remote.label: Remote agents (HTTP + API key)
settings.mcp.remote.help: Endpoint /mcp. Create a key above and send it as a Bearer token.
settings.mcp.desktop.label: Claude Desktop / Cursor (local)
settings.mcp.desktop.help: Add to claude_desktop_config.json. Local stdio needs no API key; set the owner email so decks are attributed to you.
settings.mcp.rest.label: Prefer plain REST?
admin.users.addModal.alreadyExists: A user with this email already exists.
admin.users.addModal.title: Add new user
admin.users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
admin.users.editModal.title: Edit user
admin.users.help: Add, edit, or remove users. New users will receive an email invitation to set up their account.
admin.users.name: Name
admin.users.title: User management
settings.admin.notifications.hint: Configure email notifications for comments. Requires BREVO_API_KEY and BREVO_SENDER_EMAIL environment variables.
settings.admin.notifications.title: Admin: email notifications
settings.admin.supportedSlideLangs.hint: This controls which languages are visible/usable in language mode and translation.
settings.admin.supportedSlideLangs.title: Admin: supported slide languages
settings.admin.webhooks.hint: Configure webhook URLs to receive POSTed JSON payloads when certain events happen.
settings.admin.webhooks.movedToWorkspace: When a presentation is shared to the workspace
settings.admin.webhooks.slideAddedToTeam: When a slide is added to the team library
settings.admin.webhooks.published.title: When a presentation is published
settings.admin.webhooks.title: Admin: webhooks
settings.changePassword.hint: Change your account password. You'll stay logged in after changing.
settings.changePassword.title: Change password
settings.changePassword.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.help: Profile and UI language are stored per user. Slide language support is managed centrally (admin).
settings.notifications.hint: Choose how you want to be notified about comments on your presentations.
settings.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.profile.hint: Used as your name in the app (instead of the auth name).
settings.profile.title: Profile
settings.slideLangMode.hint: Used for the editor’s “language mode”, AI output, and slide translation tools.
settings.slideLangMode.title: Slides language mode
settings.slideLangMode.titleHint: Language mode (default for new presentations and AI)
settings.title: Settings
settings.uiLocale.hint: The language of this application's interface, unrelated to the language used in slides.
settings.uiLocale.title: Application language
settings.admin.emailTemplates.title: Admin: Email Templates
settings.admin.emailTemplates.hint: Customize email templates sent by the system. Changes override code defaults.
settings.admin.emailTemplates.defaultLoc: Default language for new user invitations:
settings.admin.emailTemplates.resetConfi: Reset this template to the default? This will remove all customizations for this language.
settings.admin.analytics.title: Engagement Insights
settings.admin.analytics.hint: Configure how engagement data is collected and displayed.
settings.admin.analytics.enabledHint: Master switch for all analytics collection.
settings.admin.analytics.teamPolicyOff: Off - Don't track team member views
settings.admin.analytics.teamPolicyOptIn: Opt-in detailed - Show names if viewer allows
settings.admin.analytics.allowDetailedOp: Allow presenters to request detailed team analytics
settings.privacy.title: Privacy
settings.privacy.hint: Control how your activity is tracked and displayed.
settings.privacy.allowAttribution: Allow my views to be attributed to me
settings.privacy.allowAttributionHint: When enabled, presenters can see your name when you view their presentations.
settings.privacy.disableTracking: Opt out of all engagement tracking
settings.privacy.disableTrackingHint: When enabled, your views won't be recorded in any analytics.
settings.digest.title: Weekly Digest
settings.digest.hint: Receive a weekly summary of how your presentations are performing.
settings.admin.stockMedia.title: Stock Media
settings.admin.stockMedia.hint: Enable stock photo and GIF integrations for the image picker. Requires API keys in server environment.
settings.admin.stockMedia.unsplashHint: Search and use high-quality photos from Unsplash. Requires UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY.
settings.admin.stockMedia.giphyHint: Search and use animated GIFs from Giphy. Requires GIPHY_API_KEY.
settings.admin.leads.title: Lead Capture
settings.admin.leads.hint: Configure lead capture settings for presentation forms.
settings.notifications.leadEmailsHint: Receive an email when someone submits a lead form on your presentation.
settings.themes.description: Create and manage custom themes for your organization. Custom themes define colors, fonts, and logos for presentations.
settings.themes.workspace.title: Theme picker
settings.themes.workspace.hint: Set the theme new presentations start with, and which themes appear in the picker up front. Hidden themes stay reachable behind "Show all themes".
settings.themes.workspace.visibleHint: Check the themes shown up front. The default theme is always visible. With everything checked, new themes are visible automatically.
settings.themes.noThemesHint: Create a custom theme to define your organization's brand colors and fonts.
settings.themes.deleteConfirm: Delete this theme? This cannot be undone.
settings.themes.themeNameHint: Give your theme a descriptive name.
settings.themes.logoHint: Upload your logo image. SVG format recommended for best quality.
settings.themes.colorsHint: Define your brand colors. Accent colors are derived from the primary color.
settings.themes.fontsHint: Choose fonts for headings and body text.
settings.themes.dropLogoHere: Drop logo here or click to upload
settings.themes.logoSmallHint: Smaller logo for title slides. Uses main logo if not set.
settings.analytics.description: External analytics complement built-in insights by tracking cross-site visitor journeys. Choose privacy-friendly providers that respect your visitors.
settings.analytics.envVarsNote: Analytics can also be configured via environment variables. Settings configured here will override environment variables.
settings.analytics.privacyFriendlyDesc: These providers are designed with privacy in mind. They typically do not use cookies and are GDPR-compliant by default.
settings.analytics.requiresConsentDesc: These providers set cookies and require a consent banner under GDPR/ePrivacy. Consider privacy-friendly alternatives above.
settings.analytics.providers.umami.descr: Cookie-free, GDPR compliant, open-source analytics. Can be self-hosted.
settings.analytics.providers.umami.websi: Found in your Umami dashboard under Settings > Websites
settings.analytics.providers.umami.urlHi: Leave empty for Umami Cloud, or enter your self-hosted URL
settings.analytics.providers.plausible.d: Lightweight, cookie-free analytics. EU-hosted cloud option available.
The domain you want to track
settings.analytics.providers.plausible.u: Leave empty for Plausible Cloud, or enter your self-hosted URL
settings.analytics.providers.matomo.desc: Full-featured, self-hostable analytics with cookie-free tracking mode.
settings.analytics.providers.matomo.site: Found in Matomo under Settings > Websites > Manage
settings.analytics.providers.matomo.requ: Wait for explicit user consent before tracking
settings.analytics.providers.googleAnaly: Google's analytics platform. Widely used but sets cookies.
Google Analytics sets cookies and shares data with Google. You should display a cookie consent banner and update your privacy policy when using this provider.
Found in GA4 > Admin > Data Streams > your stream
settings.analytics.validation.enabledBut: Provider is enabled but required fields are missing. It won't be active until configured.
settings.notifications.defaultLevel.help: Applies to decks without their own setting. Direct @mentions always come through.
settings.themes.preview.title: Your presentation title
settings.themes.preview.subtitle: A subtitle, in the body font
settings.themes.preview.body:
- Body text in the body font
- A second point
- A third point
settings.themes.preview.quote: A quote, on the theme’s dark surface.
